reason: Successfully sent a math question to agent QA-20260429-171524-wvwo and verified the response contains "4"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with Super Agent app and sidebar showing agents
Found and clicked agent "QA-20260429-171524-wvwo" in the sidebar — Agent page loaded, showing the agent detail view with status indicator and message input
Verified agent status is "idle" — Status indicator showed "idle" status before sending message
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in the input field — Message text entered into the message input field (ref=e128)
Clicked Send message button — Message sent successfully, conversation transitioned to chat view with activity indicator showing "Working..."
Waited up to 3 minutes for agent response — Agent responded within 1 second, displaying the answer "4" in the chat

Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — Screenshot captured showing the conversation with user message "Hello! What is 2+2?" and agent response "4", with agent status returned to "idle" and timing showing "Worked for 1s"
